title: High-Performing District Schemes
description: Write a query joining scheme_budget_utilization and district_policy_outcomes on state_code. Return scheme_name as Scheme, district_name as District, health_index as HealthIndex, and education_index as EduIndex — but only where education_index > 61 AND health_index > 61.

schema: CREATE TABLE scheme_budget_utilization (scheme_id TEXT, scheme_name TEXT, ministry TEXT, state_code TEXT, year INTEGER, allocated_budget_cr REAL, utilized_budget_cr REAL)
CREATE TABLE district_policy_outcomes (district_id TEXT, district_name TEXT, state_code TEXT, year INTEGER, health_index REAL, education_index REAL)
seed: INSERT INTO scheme_budget_utilization VALUES ('SCH02','Jal Jeevan Mission','Jal Shakti','UP',2020,1180.6,1096.1)
testCases.solutionQuery: SELECT s.scheme_name AS Scheme, d.district_name AS District, d.health_index AS HealthIndex, d.education_index AS EduIndex FROM scheme_budget_utilization s JOIN district_policy_outcomes d ON s.state_code = d.state_code WHERE d.education_index > 61 AND d.health_index > 61

schema: CREATE TABLE scheme_budget_utilization (scheme_id TEXT, scheme_name TEXT, ministry TEXT, state_code TEXT, year INTEGER, allocated_budget_cr REAL, utilized_budget_cr REAL)
CREATE TABLE district_policy_outcomes (district_id TEXT, district_name TEXT, state_code TEXT, year INTEGER, health_index REAL, education_index REAL)
seed: INSERT INTO scheme_budget_utilization VALUES ('SCH01','State Skill Program','Skill','MH',2021,5000.0,4500.0)
INSERT INTO scheme_budget_utilization VALUES ('SCH02','Old Age Pension','Social','RJ',2021,800.0,700.0)
testCases.solutionQuery: SELECT s.scheme_name AS Scheme, d.district_name AS District, d.health_index AS HealthIndex, d.education_index AS EduIndex FROM scheme_budget_utilization s JOIN district_policy_outcomes d ON s.state_code = d.state_code WHERE d.education_index > 61 AND d.health_index > 61
